zh.lifeSummary: Alice Shirley於1524年出生在英國英格蘭艾可艾皮三。她於1545年與Sir William Lawrence Stacie在英國英格蘭艾可艾皮三結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1616年8月2日在英國英格蘭艾可格亞特 哈林波利享年92歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可格亞特 哈林波利。

nameMeanings.name: Shirley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places so named, such as Shirley (Warwickshire), Shirley in Millbrook (Hampshire), Shirley (Surrey), Shirley in Owston (Yorkshire), and Shirley (Derbyshire). The placenames probably derive from Old English scīr ‘bright’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’, though some may have scīr ‘district, shire’ as the initial element if they lie on a boundary; for example, the Warwickshire place lies on the Warwickshire-Worcestershire boundary. The name Shirley first appears in Ireland in the late 17th century, following the granting of lands to a Shirley family in the barony of Farney, Monaghan.

History: William Shirley (1694–1771) was born in Sussex, England, and came to MA in 1731. He rose in the colonial service, was appointed governor in 1741, and was responsible for the British capture of the French fortress of Louisbourg, Cape Breton Island, in 1745.

variants.name: Sherley
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Shirley  .
Americanized form of Norwegian Sjøli or Sjølie: habitational name from a farmstead named with sjø ‘sea, lake’ + li ‘hillside’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: Alice Shirley was born in 1524, in Epping, Essex, England, United Kingdom. She married Sir William Lawrence Stacie in 1545, in Epping, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 2 August 1616, in Great Hallingbury, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 92, and was buried in Great Hallingbury, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Shirleyは1524年にイギリスイギリスエセックスエップイングで生まれた。1545年にイギリスイギリスエセックスエップイングでSir William Lawrence Stacieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1616年8月2日にイギリスイギリスエセックスグレアト ハリングブリーで92歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスグレアト ハリングブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Shirley(은)는 1524년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 핀그에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1545년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 핀그에서 Sir William Lawrence Stacie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1616년 8월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 그리트 핼링버이에서 92세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 그리트 핼링버이에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Alice Shirley родилась в 1524 г. в местности эппинг, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Lawrence Stacie в 1545 г. в местности эппинг, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 2 августа 1616 г. в местности грит холлингбури, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 92 лет и была похоронена в местности грит холлингбури, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
